message:
Merge pull request #11 from kubestellar/remove-stale-workflow

chore: remove stale workflow in favor of Prow

files.patch:
@@ -1,11 +0,0 @@
-name: Mark and close stale issues
-
-on:
-  schedule:
-    - cron: "0 0 * * *"
-  workflow_dispatch: {}
-
-jobs:
-  stale:
-    uses: kubestellar/infra/.github/workflows/reusable-stale.yml@main
-    secrets: inherit
